creator: dave@jetcafe.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Kondratyev from comment #7)

> You definitely did something wrong. usbhid.ko MUST NOT be autoloaded.  

I am at 13.4-STABLE and not at 14. Could this also be the source of the trouble? 

If 13.4 is not the source of the trouble, then your comment is confusing. I run many FreeBSD boxes from the exact same build (stable/13-1ec3289e48), with the exact same loader.conf.  In each case loader.conf has nothing about usb in it at all. 

Some of these machines have usbhid autoloaded, some do not. The only source of data that points to why autoloading happens is ... having a USB keyboard on the box. :)

> Probably, you compiled out ukbd and this keyboard does not advertise boot
protocol support in USB interface to autoload it.

I can assure you I did no such thing.
